# Daily Flow Summary

A day of strategic planning. Professor Lawrence proposed presenting the Verona Platform at Tuesday's joint board quarterly review.

The plan is ambitious but clear: build a polished demo, get on the agenda through Nurse Angela, and bring Benvolio in for infrastructure credibility.

Paris Duke is the wild card — he is pushing the Capulet board toward his VC-backed alternative. We need the demo to be undeniably better.

Juliet is fully committed. We have 48 hours to prepare the presentation of our lives.
